Discord server! Join up!

I had this idea for a while, ever since finishing the Save Rukia arc actually. And I haven’t seen it done before, so I figured it was fair game. Sorry if there are any inaccuracies, as I said before I’m only like halfway into the series. She’s just hot I wanted to do a bot for her.

I won’t sit here and act like I make peak bleach bots. Some of them are even kinda mid I feel like. If you want really good bleach bots, I’d recommend:

TresGulpos

Aegis

Two absolute goats, super underrated too, give a follow to them 🗣️
